description_long: This is a whimsical cotton candy cart kiosk, predominantly pink with a pastel blue and white striped canopy roof supported by four black poles. The cart features a large, round cotton candy machine at its center, flanked by several colorful cotton candy sticks displayed on the side tray. The front of the cart has a printed sign reading 'Cotton Candy' in playful lettering. Two large, spoked wheels with gold and black accents support the cart, while a handle at the rear allows for easy maneuvering. The structure is compact, with a flat working surface and a small shelf beneath the machine for storage.
description: A pastel pink cotton candy cart kiosk with a striped canopy, large wheels, and a central cotton candy machine, adorned with colorful cotton candy sticks and a playful sign.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the 'Cotton Candy' sign, machine, canopy, and colorful cotton candy sticks on the side tray.
description_view_1: Direct front view highlighting the cotton candy sticks, machine, and the symmetry of the cart's design.
description_view_2: Side angled view displaying the wheels, handle, and the arrangement of the cotton candy sticks on the tray.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the handle for pushing the cart and the back of the canopy, with no signage visible.
attribute_signage_type: printed sign on the front panel with the text 'Cotton Candy'
attribute_roof_design: flat canopy roof with pastel blue, pink, and white stripes, supported by four black poles
